description: From a single spark of ambition to a global force of innovation and impact.
heading: A Dream Born in Kota. A Story Reaching the World.

phases.description: In 2012, in the heart of Kota, Rajasthan, a small dream took flight. Built by passionate minds who believed talent deserves limitless opportunity, B2B Sales Arrow began its journey with one client, one service, and an enduring belief that purpose inspires possibilities.
phases.title: Where the Journey Began

phases.description: Like an ARROW aimed beyond the horizon, we evolved from a market research startup into a trusted global event solutions partner. Today, we collaborate with Fortune 500 companies worldwide, guided by our values, powered by innovation, and inspired by the endless possibilities ahead.
phases.title: How Far We've Come
